meaning: adj.下坡的,倾斜的adv.往下,每况愈下
examples: Their marriage went downhill after the first child was born.
I started work as a journalist and it was downhill all the way for my health.
On the descents, cyclists spin past cars, freewheeling downhill at tremendous speed.
Dewa Nayoma offers everything from airport runs to full-day excursions and downhill biking tours.
He ran for about two hours, always heading downhill, until he entered a mountain valley.
